message:
fix: add keyboard navigation to 3 more cards (batch 2 of #8883) (#8910)

* fix: add roving-tabindex keyboard navigation to 3 more cards (#8883)

Second-wave partial fix for the Auto-QA keyboard-nav gaps in #8883,
continuing the work started in #8902. Adds roving-tabindex keyboard
navigation to clickable list items in three more cards:

- AlertListItem.tsx (used by ActiveAlerts) - alert rows
- OpenCostOverview.tsx - Cost by Namespace list
- ProactiveGPUNodeHealthMonitor.tsx - GPU node rows (toggle expand)

Each list item now supports:
- role="button" + tabIndex={0} for screen readers and Tab traversal
- Enter / Space - activate (drill-down or toggle expand)
- ArrowUp / ArrowDown - move focus between siblings
- Home / End - jump to first / last item
- focus-visible:ring-2 ring-cyan-400 for visible keyboard focus

Container <div>s gain role="list" so list semantics are exposed to AT.
GPU node rows additionally gain aria-expanded so AT announces the
collapsed/expanded state.

Existing mouse behavior (onClick, cursor-pointer, hover) is unchanged.

Mirrors the pattern landed in #8902 for NetworkOverview,
KustomizationStatus, and OperatorStatus. Cards previously touched by
#8902 (and the parallel ARIA-gaps work in #8884) are intentionally
left alone to avoid conflicts.

Addresses #8883

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: prefix multi-line JSX comments with * to avoid hex-color false positive

The ui-ux-standard ratchet matches #NNNN issue refs in multi-line
JSX comments without the ' * ' continuation prefix, treating them
as raw hex colors. Reformat the two new keynav comments accordingly.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
